---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior or interface you'd like. Include example commands if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples that would help clarify the request.
